description: The Stidda is a Sicilian mafia-type criminal organization active in the provinces of Agrigento, Caltanissetta, and Ragusa. It emerged in the late 1980s in Riesi as a confederation of autonomous criminal groups opposed to Cosa Nostra. The organization was formed by former mafiosi who were expelled from their families and recruited local youth gangs. It engaged in violent feuds with rival mafia groups.

country_links.evidence_quote: cellule della Stidda sono rintracciabili anche all'estero, come in Germania , dove i suoi affiliati riescono ad approvvigionarsi di droga e armi e hanno trovato riparo dopo aver compiuto crimini clamorosi...
country_links.context: The Stidda has cells in Germany where members obtain drugs and weapons and have found refuge after committing crimes.
